title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Syntel India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Syntel India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Syntel India:
Syntel India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Syntel India!
